title: Jurassic Park Revived
description: A revival of the old Jurassic park Texture pack made by Captain_NA but improved by calebdinoking10 for newer versions (WIP)
body: The start of something new, risen from the old the new Jurassic pack will have everything the old one had and more. Build your dream parks with blocks minecraft couldn't dream of adding. Burn stones, rustic old building parts, futuristic labs, the world is yours young Hammond. Credits to Captain_NA for the original texture pack for 1.7.10 XD
